zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Poyntz於1309年2月9日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet31歲，母親Elizabeth Zouche34歲。他於1343年6月27日之前與Elizabeth de Clanvowe在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1376年2月24日在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

zh-hans.Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Engla: 英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利
zh-hans.Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾姆 代可其

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Poyntz于1309年2月9日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托金頓时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet31岁，母亲Elizabeth Zouche34岁。他于1343年6月27日之前与Elizabeth de Clanvowe在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1376年2月24日在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Poyntz was born on 9 February 1309, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Zouche, was 34. He married Elizabeth de Clanvowe before 27 June 1343, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 24 February 1376, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Poyntz est né le 9 février 1309, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Zouche, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Clanvowe avant 27 juin 1343, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 24 février 1376, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Poyntz am 9. Februar 1309 in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Zouche 34. Er hat vor 27. Juni 1343 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Clanvowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. Februar 1376 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Poyntz è nato il il 9 febbraio 1309 nel Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Zouche, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Clanvowe prima del 27 giugno 1343, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 febbraio 1376, nel Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Poyntzが1309年2月9日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Malletは31歳，母Elizabeth Zoucheは34歳であった。1343年6月27日以前にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth de Clanvoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1376年2月24日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Poyntz(이)가 1309년 2월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Zouche(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1343년 6월 27일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth de Clanvowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1376년 2월 24일 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

mn.9 February 1309–24 February 1376: 1309 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 9–1376 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 24

pt.9 February 1309–24 February 1376: 9 de fevereiro de 1309–24 de fevereiro de 1376
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Poyntz nasceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1309, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Zouche, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Clanvowe antes 27 de junho de 1343, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1376, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Poyntz родился 9 февраля 1309 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Zouche, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Clanvowe перед 27 июнь 1343 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 24 февраля 1376 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.9 February 1309–24 February 1376: 9 de febrero de 1309–24 de febrero de 1376
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Poyntz nació el 9 de febrero de 1309, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Zouche, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Clanvowe antes de 27 de junio de 1343, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1376, en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
